title: ReducedLoot
description: Reduced Loot cuts down the amount of items found in naturally generated loot chests across all structures – from vanilla dungeons to modded fortresses – bringing scarcity, balance, and challenge back to exploration-heavy modpacks.
body:
# 🎁 Reduced Loot - Mod
Loot chests too generous? Make exploration meaningful again.

Reduced Loot cuts down the amount of items found in naturally generated loot chests across all structures – from vanilla dungeons to modded fortresses – bringing scarcity, balance, and challenge back to exploration-heavy modpacks.
Whether you're raiding a Bastion or looting a Waystone hut, you'll find less loot, but every item will matter more.
![reducedloot-banner1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/111bbbff657304f1483f1e24a3664216639e77c1_0.webp)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/MeNlGu6re68" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## 🔻 What it does
- 📉 Reduces the quantity of items in all generated loot chests
- 🔄 Works with vanilla and modded structures and loot tables
- ✅ Fully compatible with Lootr and most loot-handling mods
- ⚙️ Lightweight and configurable via the config file

![RedcuedLoot-Banner2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2226a493a5e0d77a002fe5e78e005155e1c60874_0.webp)

## 💡 Perfect for players who want:
- A more survival- or progression-focused experience
- To slow down early-game gear power creep
- Balanced exploration in large or quest-driven modpacks

## 🧩 Compatible with:
- Lootr, Structory, When Dungeons Arise, Repurposed Structures, and more
- Does not override loot table definitions – only modifies output
- Seamlessly integrates with most structure generation and chest-modifying mods

## 📦 Lightweight. Configurable. Focused.
Because not every chest needs to feel like a jackpot.

![license_banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fcb02ac17ea39fe83ef86a51c0ab0681e7cec489.webp)
